name: Lee Ranaldo
description: '''Lee Mark Ranaldo''' (born February 3, 1956) is an American musician, singer and songwriter best known as the rhythm guitarist and vocalist of [[alternative rock]] band [[Sonic Youth]]. In 2004, ''[[Rolling Stone]]'' ranked Ranaldo at number 33 on its "Greatest Guitarists of All Time" list. In May 2012, ''[[Spin (magazine)|Spin]]'' published a staff-selected top 100 guitarist list, ranking Ranaldo and his Sonic Youth bandmate [[Thurston Moore]] together at number 1.
